rationale: The user 'user-01$' (a machine account) accessed the IPC$ share (A0) and subsequently accessed the SYSVOL share (EV-001, EV-002, EV-003) to read gpt.ini files. While machine accounts accessing SYSVOL is common, the initial IPC$ access followed by multiple gpt.ini reads could indicate reconnaissance or an attempt to enumerate Group Policy Objects, which is suspicious behavior for a machine account.
